'''Gulginaws''' were flying creatures native to the planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. They were also known to live on nearby planet [[Talus/Legends|Talus]].

{{Creature-stub}}

[[File:Gulginaw_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
